payload:
# re.kriate — Complete Seamstress Kria Sequencer

## Objective

Complete all missing kria features for the seamstress platform: extended pages (ratchet, alt-note, glide), direction modes, pattern storage, and mute fix. Success = all features from the spec work end-to-end with full test coverage.

## Spec Pipeline (speckit)

This project uses **speckit** for spec-driven development. All artifacts live in `specs/001-seamstress-kria-features/`:

| Artifact | Path | Purpose |
|----------|------|--... [truncated, 3769 chars total]
US9 mute fix complete: 3 tests + implementation, 214 passing, commit dc89a81. Next: US8 direction integration or US11 extended page toggle.
multiclaude is available to do work and create PRs
US8 direction integration complete: 4 tests + 2-line sequencer fix, 218 passing, commit 42271f6. Next: US11 extended page toggle or US12-14 extended pages.
US11 extended page toggle complete: 11 tests (4 red), EXTENDED_PAGES map + toggle logic in nav_key, 229 passing, commit 33296e5. Next: US12-14 extended pages or US10 pattern storage.
US12-14 extended pages sequencer integration complete: 8 tests (6 red), glide/ratchet/alt_note in step_track, 237 passing, commit f1983df. Next: US10 pattern storage.
US10 pattern save/load wiring complete: 7 tests (5 red), ctx.patterns in app.init, Ctrl+1-9 save / Shift+1-9 load in keyboard.lua, 244 passing, commit d8a9a36. All runtime tasks closed.

US11 keyboard toggle complete: 8 tests (4 red), KEY_PAGE map + EXTENDED_TO_PRIMARY toggle logic in keyboard.lua matching grid_ui behavior, 252 passing, commit 5bd489e. Remaining: US5 screen UI, T041 direction params, US1-4/US6-7 test verification, T064-T066 integration/coverage.

US8 direction params complete (T041): 4 tests (3 red), per-track direction params in app.lua with set_action mapping to direction.MODES, 256 passing, commit 89a47e7. Remaining: US5 screen UI, US1-4/US6-7 test verification, T048/T050/T052 extended display tests, T064-T066 integration/coverage.

US5 screen_ui complete (T029-T032): 12 tests (3 red), extended page indicator (trigger > ratchet format), mute display per track, 268 passing, commit 3208885. Remaining: US1-4/US6-7 test verification, T048/T050/T052 extended display tests, T064-T066 integration/coverage.

US1-4 verification tests complete (T013-T020): 4 new tests (1 red), stop() now calls all_notes_off for MIDI silence, polymetric test added, T014-T020 already covered. 272 passing, commit 4c390b4. Remaining: US6-7 tests, T048/T050/T052 extended display tests, T064-T066 integration.

US6-7 verification tests complete (T033-T036): 13 new tests (7 clock division, 4 scale quantization, 2 combined). All pass without implementation changes — features already correct. 284 passing, commit b200a53. Remaining: T048/T050/T052 extended display tests, T064-T066 integration.

## Reason
consecutive_failures

## Status
Too many consecutive failures.

## Summary
- Iterations: 15
- Duration: 40m 42s
- Exit code: 1
